top_signals.title: Copper Rallies From Three-Week Low as Trump Flags Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Copper rebounded from its lowest close since mid-May after President Donald Trump claimed the US was on the cusp of ending the war with Iran that’s threatening the global economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lloyds Taps Japan’s Booming Samurai Market With ¥75 Billion Sale
top_signals.summary: Lloyds Banking Group Plc became the latest borrower to sell bonds in the booming Samurai market, where issuance has reached the highest level since fiscal year 2015 amid strong demand from yield-seeking investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Microsoft fixes BitLocker recovery bug on Windows Server 2025
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has resolved a known issue causing some Windows Server 2025 devices to boot into BitLocker recovery after installing the April 2026 security update. [...]
